core_mechanism: a finite-parameter continuous deformation (homotopy) of an exact solution to a governing field equation, producing a one/two-parameter family that interpolates between qualitatively distinct regimes and recovers a known reference solution as a limiting case
brief_reason: The abstract builds a family characterized by just the parameters {M,a} that interpolates between regular configurations, integrable-singularity configurations, and the Kerr solution as a limiting case, i.e. a low-dimensional parametric deformation connecting distinct regimes to a known solution.
